ARCC.author: DFV
ARCC.thesis: CLOSED. ARCC $17P 2026-04-17 expired worthless. Original thesis: macro tail-risk hedge / credit-spread widening expectation that did not materialize within the contract window. Premium lost ~$15. Lesson: bought protection without a defined exit/roll trigger; theta beat realized vol.

BKLN.author: DFV
BKLN.invalidation: Close if BKLN > $21.00 sustained 2 sessions. Hard time-stop = 21 DTE (2026-05-28).
BKLN.thesis: Senior loan ETF (floating-rate leveraged loans). Hedge against leveraged-credit dislocation if Fed pivots dovish (kills floating-rate appeal) or default cycle accelerates. Near ATM. 3 contracts.

EMB.author: DFV
EMB.invalidation: Already at expiry. Time-stop = today close.
EMB.thesis: EM USD-denominated debt hedge. Dollar-strength + EM credit-spread blowout play. EXPIRES TODAY -- let it die or close for residual bid.

GME.author: DFV
GME.invalidation: Cash burn > /qtr OR loss of net-cash position OR breach of
GME.thesis: Net-cash balance sheet (.6B), brand recognition, optionality on console refresh, no debt.

HYG.author: DFV
HYG.invalidation: Close if HYG > $80.50 sustained, or HY OAS tightens below 290bp. Hard time-stop = 21 DTE (2026-05-28).
HYG.thesis: HY credit-spread widening hedge. $77P is ~5% OTM -- protection against a junk-bond reversal if growth slows or defaults cluster. 1 contract, small.

OBDC.author: DFV
catalysts: Q2 BDC earnings late Jul / early Aug
OBDC.invalidation: Roll/close if OBDC > $15.50 (sustained) or HY OAS tightens below 280bp into Jun-end. Hard time-stop = 21 DTE (2026-06-26).
OBDC.thesis: BDC credit-stress hedge. OBDC NAV is sensitive to middle-market loan defaults; $7.50 strike is ~30%+ OTM, lottery-style protection against a credit air-pocket. 11 contracts, small notional.
